title: OneMoreTime
description: Prevent you from getting oneshot from anything if your health is more than 6 heart
body:
# OneMoreTime
- You can avoid death from high-damage attacks if you have more than 6 hearts of health. Instead of being eliminated in a single hit, you'll stay alive with half a heart remaining, giving you a fighting chance to escape or recover!

## Supported Damage Types:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Explosion (TNT, Creepers, etc.)
- Fall Damage
- Player Attacks (PvP scenarios)
- Mob Attacks (Hostile creatures)
- Magic Damage (Potions, certain mob abilities)
- Mob Projectiles (Skeleton arrows, etc.)
- Player Explosions (Bed explosions in the Nether/End)

</details>


## Features:
- Survival Protection: If your health is above 6 hearts, incoming fatal damage from the listed types will leave you at half a heart instead of killing you.
- Balanced Gameplay: This mod adds a layer of survivability without making you invincible, perfect for those who want a more forgiving survival experience.
  
Imagine when you're playing RPG modpack with your friends and they survive boss attack with just half a heart.
